mapper.select:
SELECT s.id As id, s.buy_contract_id As buyContractId, s.buy_product_id As buyProductId, s.product_name As productName, s.product_cd As productCd, s.brand_number As brandNumber, s.factory_id As factoryId, s.factory_name As factoryName, s.warehouse_id As warehouseId, s.warehouse_name As warehouseName, s.deal_price As dealPrice, s.warehouse_amount As warehouseAmount, s.buy_number As buyNumber, s.selling_number As sellingNumber, s.sell_number As sellNumber, s.presell_number As presellNumber, s.delivery_in_number As deliveryInNumber, s.delivery_out_number As deliveryOutNumber, s.enterprise_id As enterprise_id, s.biz_user_id As bizUserId, s.biz_user_name As bizUserName, c.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, c.quality_standard As qualityStandard, (s.buy_number-s.selling_number-s.sell_number) As remainNumber, p.wrap_specs As wrapSpecs, p.warehouse_pos As warehousePos, p.product_attr As productAttr, p.warehouse_price As warehousePrice FROM t_stock_contract s LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c ON s.buy_contract_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p ON p.id = s.buy_product_id WHERE c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_status != 'C' AND c.contract_status != 'B' AND c.apply_cancel_flg = false
AND ( s.buy_number > ( s.selling_number + s.sell_number ) ) ORDER BY s.id DESC
